displayName: Course Reserves Circulation Stats (Listings-Only Term Logic)
description: Checkout counts for selected items in course reserves, using only course listing -> term relationships for term resolution (no term date comparisons).

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.displayName: Earliest date of circulation activity (kept for compatibility)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.displayName: Latest date of circulation activity (kept for compatibility)

parameters.name: course_codes
parameters.displayName: Filter by course codes (e.g. TEST 101, ENGL 39)

parameters.name: exclusions
parameters.displayName: Exclude course types [POP, LAW, NEW, EMPTY]

parameters.name: show_historical_reserves
parameters.displayName: Show historical reserves (1 to toggle ON)

parameters.name: show_historical_checkouts
parameters.displayName: Show historical checkouts (1 to toggle ON)
